gist.headline: Terminal Tofu
gist.blurb: Tofu has joined the Pollinations ecosystem. It's a rich AI chat client for your terminal, because sometimes you just want to talk to a language model without leaving the command line.
gist.summary: Added Tofu, a rich terminal-based AI chat client, to the Pollinations app ecosystem.
gist.impact: Developers can now chat with Pollinations models directly from their terminal using Tofu's formatted CLI interface.
gist.visual_concept: A literal block of tofu functioning as a retro computer terminal. Polly the bee interacting with it in a cozy hacker setup.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, typing on a retro computer terminal that looks like a chunky block of white tofu. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, typing on a retro computer terminal that looks like a chunky block of white tofu. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
